old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.11","title":"Schedule periodic RPL maintenance","description":"Discovered during project-LICHEN-2auf.44.10 review: Router::prune_neighbors and idle DAO route expiry are caller-driven, but no repository production scheduler invokes them periodically. Integrate one monotonic u64 maintenance tick through the production node/runtime path with a configured neighbor timeout, expire finite DAO routes while idle, and preserve Trickle behavior.","acceptance_criteria":"A production runtime calls RPL maintenance on a bounded interval using the same monotonic u64 epoch as receive processing; stale neighbors and finite DAO routes expire without inbound traffic; literal integration tests and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:39:40.44155Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T18:39:40.44155Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.11","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:39:40.572511Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.11","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.10","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2026-07-18T18:39:40.690928Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
